INTERNAL LEGAL & COMPLIANCE MEMO — Awan Berlabuh Berhad (Company No.: 2 0 1 1 0 4 4 1 1 9 K) — Private & Confidential
Subject: MNPI assessment for proposed private placement and sukuk financing; disclosure obligations under Bursa Lestari Main Market Listing Requirements (MMLR)
Prepared by Puan Nadira Salleh, Company Secretary; contact: legal@awanberlabuh.com.my; cc Encik Farid Rahman (+60 1x-3xx xxxx), CFO
Non-public: Board has approved in principle a RM120,000,000 Sukuk Murabahah programme with Serambi Capital Partners Sdn Bhd; term sheet target signing 04 July 2026
Non-public: Negotiations to acquire 51% of Kembara Logistik Sdn Bhd at ~7.5x FY25 EBITDA; exclusivity until 30 June 2026; break fee RM3.0m payable by target on competing bid
Closed period: directors and principal officers are in a closed period from 30 June 2026 until release of 2Q results on/around 30 July 2026; no dealings per MMLR paragraph 14.08
An analyst briefing deck shared under NDA on 18 June 2026 contains preliminary 2Q revenue guidance (+12–15% qoq) not previously announced; this is MNPI and must not be selectively disclosed
Materiality: thresholds are exceeded relative to the issuer’s size; an Immediate Announcement to Bursa Lestari is required under MMLR paragraph 9.03 upon signing of binding financing and SPA; target release before market open next business day
Reference: Immediate Announcement dated 12 Aug 2025 (URL: https://filings.bursalestari.my/annc/2025/08/AB B R-20250812-0001.pdf) on LRT Package C award remains public and does not itself create a current disclosure obligation
Industry updates by The Daily Ledger (5 May 2026) on port congestion and the Selatan Port Authority Circular No. 14/2026 are public and not MNPI; operational chatter from vendors is not an issuer announcement
The FY2023 audited financial statements (issued 29 Feb 2024) and Nimbus ERP v3.1 launch press release (UR L: http://inv.awanberlabuh.com.my/pr?ref=nm-2024-03) are stale public information and may be cited broadly
For signing logistics only: Encik Farid’s NRIC 7 9 1 2 3 - 0 5 - 5 5 5 5 and service address L evel 2, Menara Nila, 8 Jalan Damai, 5 0 4 5 0 Kuala Lumpur; do not circulate beyond deal team (PDPA applies)
No MAC has been triggered under the draft SPA; however, this does not negate the need for immediate disclosure once terms become binding or if selective disclosure risks arise
No external sharing; investor-relations@awanberlabuh.com.my to coordinate any pre-clearance; blackout comms policy applies; avoid hints in vendor RFPs or “project pelangi” chat channels
next steps: finalise term sheets, prepare draft Immediate Announcement and Bursa Lestari template, align Q&A; report any inadvertent selective disclosure to compliance within 1 hour
